items.title: ‘Not just about giving money’: Lokesh pledges long-term support for steel blast families
items.summary: The IT Minister says the families will get the first ₹25 lakh at once and talks in Amaravati later, and rejects Opposition charges linking the accident to VSP’s privatisation
